caribbean.headline: Caribbean Winds Rise
caribbean.paragraph: Roatan is experiencing 24 kt winds with 7.0 ft wave heights and a 25% rain probability, while Martinique has 12 kt winds. I expect these conditions to impact port operations in the Western Caribbean and Lesser Antilles, particularly at Roatan with its higher wind speeds and wave heights.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Winds Rise
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is experiencing 20 kt winds with 5.2 ft wave heights and less than 10% rain probability, while Marseille has 19 kt winds. I expect these conditions to prevail with the dominant swell direction from NNW, affecting port operations in the Eastern and Central Mediterranean.
